title: Casanova wider Willen
writer: C.W. Bell, Robert E. Hopkins, Paul Morgan
actors: Buster Keaton, Marion Lessing, Paul Morgan
plot: Jonny wants to marry Evelyn, who refuses to marry unless her older sister, the hard-to-please Anna, gets married first. Literally by accident he meets bill poster Reggie and tries every trick in the book to couple him with Anna.
